title: Bags fee-share config includes the creator wallet and BPS sum to 10000

params.absentDetail: No createBagsFeeShareConfig call in the builder. Token Launch v2 requires a fee-share config for every launch; without one the launch cannot proceed.
params.dynamicDetail: feeClaimers is assembled dynamically (variable, spread, or .map), so creator inclusion and the 10000-BPS total can't be confirmed statically. Verify by hand that the creator wallet is present with a non-zero userBps.
params.creatorMissingDetail: The creator wallet is not in feeClaimers. The creator must be an explicit entry — omitting them does NOT default them to any share; they earn zero fees forever, and the fee config is immutable on-chain after launch.
params.bpsSumDetail: feeClaimers userBps sum to {sum}, not 10000. Bags requires the allocation to total exactly 10000 (100%); a mismatch is rejected at config creation.
params.passDetail: Creator wallet '{param}' is an explicit feeClaimers entry and userBps sum to 10000.

provenance.note: Known-answer Finding: re-derives the hand-built bags-fee-share-creator-included rule via the proof-as-classifier pipeline. The rule id is suffixed -synth so it doesn't collide with the production rule when staged.
